note: v305: Desktop polish — Settings, Business Profile & sidebar. Settings and Business Profile no longer hug the left of the screen: their cards drop the fixed 500px width and the whole column is centered at a comfortable width, so the empty right side is gone. The sidebar nav is decluttered: the four section headers (Overview / Money In / Money Out / Finance) are removed in favor of one clean list of six links, the active item now uses the real violet accent (the ring was an off-brand indigo) with a tinted icon and bolder label, spacing is a touch airier, and the company name under the wordmark stays on one line.
